name: 14th Lowland Infantry Regiment
excerpt: The regiment where Dellan Moor and Sable Voss served before deserting.
notes: The 14th Lowland Infantry Regiment was a provincial infantry unit where Dellan Moor served for four years. It was primarily used for labor and construction. Sable Voss was a supply administrator in the same regiment. Both Dellan and Sable deserted from this regiment together.
